description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a single-story structure with a dark gable roof and white exterior walls. The property includes a driveway with parked vehicles, a detached garage or shed, and a backyard with a small pool and green lawn. The front yard is landscaped with trees, shrubs, and a paved patio area furnished with outdoor seating. The main entrance is sheltered by a pergola, and large windows provide ample natural light to the interior. The lot is bordered by a low wall and a black gate, with additional greenery and decorative elements enhancing the curb appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, white walls, landscaped yard, driveway, and a backyard pool, set within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, pergola, patio seating, driveway, and front yard landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, detached garage, driveway, and additional trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, green lawn, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, rear landscaping, and the side elevation of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and side facades
